transaction_context.transaction_text: Provision of software development services to an overseas related party.

rule_summaries.summary: Income of a re-invoicing centre derived from services rendered in HK, without taking commercial risks (product, inventory, credit), is fully taxable service income based on the cost-plus mark-up.
rule_summaries.source_citation: Inland Revenue Department DIPN 21 (Revised), Paragraph 27-28 - Re-invoicing Centre

rule_summaries.summary: The locality of service fee income is the place where the services are performed which give rise to the fees. An apportionment is appropriate if services are performed partly in HK and partly outside.[cite: 1]
rule_summaries.source_citation: Inland Revenue Department DIPN 21 (Revised), Paragraph 45(e) & 46 - Other Profits & Apportionment

rule_summaries.summary: Support services (e.g., marketing, training) rendered to group members substantially in HK at an agreed mark-up are wholly assessable. The HK company may deduct foreign withholding tax paid from the service fee charged.[cite: 1]
rule_summaries.source_citation: Inland Revenue Department DIPN 21 (Revised), Paragraph 51-52 - Group Service Companies
